name: Company Wiki Sync

meta.description: Syncs ai/openwebui/knowledge/company-wiki/content/ from GitHub into the Company Wiki knowledge collection. Trigger with a chat completion.

manifest.title: Knowledge Sync Pipe
manifest.author: eridu-services
manifest.description: Diffs the company wiki content tree against a target Open WebUI knowledge collection (checksum-based create/update/remove), triggered externally via a chat completion. Fetches real content from GitHub raw at a pinned ref — see content_paths in Valves. Verified end-to-end against a live disposable test collection on 0.10.2 (create, idempotent no-op, update, create, obsolete-removal) before this fetch was wired in; see ai/architecture/llm-knowledge-base-plan.md Sync Contract. Matches existing files by the document's frontmatter id, not its repo path — Open WebUI flattens uploaded filenames to their basename, which broke path-based matching on re-sync (see functions/README.md gotchas).

note: content omitted here -- canonical source is ai/openwebui/functions/sync-pipe.py, applied via POST /api/v1/functions/id/{id}/update per that file's deploy instructions.
